description: The page transitions from the loading screen to the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The 'All Set!' loading screen disappears and the flight review page loads.

description: User pauses to review the departing flight details on the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The cursor rests over the flight information area while the user reads.

description: User scrolls down the page to view the 'Add-ons' and 'Baggage' sections.
frame_description: The view shifts downwards, revealing the baggage information under the 'Add-ons' header.

description: User scrolls further down the page to reveal the 'Seats' selection section.
frame_description: The page content moves up, bringing the 'Seats' section into view.
